sentences.text: Plan mode for a whole site
A real site needs several — Home, Menu, About, Order, Contact — that link together and stay consistent.
Asking for that all at once, page by page, invites repetition and gaps.
Plan mode is for working out how to build before any file changes.
Staying in the same chat as your homepage, you switch to Plan mode and ask how to approach the site.
Claude reads your folder, asks what it needs, and proposes the pages, how they connect, and the order to build them.
